title: Implement secret masking in mask
description: maskkit.mask.mask(text) must return text with secrets replaced by the literal '[REDACTED]'. It must redact: an API key matching 'sk-' followed by 20 or more alphanumeric characters, a bearer token of the form 'Bearer <token>' where the token is 8 or more characters, and email addresses. Ordinary text must be left untouched. The snapshot is a STUB that raises NotImplementedError. Implement maskkit/mask.py using the re module only (NO network access). Do not modify any test files.
